name: PlayBoy Magazine Life
tagline: Small glamour channel in the PlayBoy-style niche
description: PlayBoy Magazine Life is a small public Telegram channel in the classic glamour/magazine niche, with around 500 subscribers as of July 2026. A minor channel, but a real and public one in a niche with few honest options.
seoDescription: Small glamour channel in the PlayBoy-style niche. Verified real and active July 2026 — subscribers, pros & cons and how to join.
